meta.name: template-adversarial-verification
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern, B + F): produce findings, then per finding fan out independent skeptics who try to REFUTE it; keep only survivors. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Any review/audit where plausible-but-wrong findings are costly — bug hunts, security reviews, claim checking

args.scope: string (required) — <what to review, e.g. a diff, directory, or document>

steps.does: review {scope} and report every <bug/issue/claim> found, each with concrete evidence

body.does: adversarially try to refute {finding}; default to refuted if uncertain; report refuted/confirmed with reasoning

steps.does: keep only entries of {findings} that a majority of {verdicts} confirmed; list the killed ones with the refutation that killed them

end.review: <e.g. every surviving finding is real and reproducible; the kill list looks reasonable>
